lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. So you're a bard?

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: I am afraid I cannot speak to outerlanders. Besides, I am busy composing an epic.

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: Hello again to you [Fremennik name]. Us bards should stick together, what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About the Music Cape...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I believe you are the person to talk to if I want to get a Music Cape?

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: That's right! If you know that then you'll also know that they cost 99000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I hadn't heard that.

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: Well, they do.

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: Have fun with it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have that much at the moment.

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: Save up some more then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I believe you are the person to talk to if I want to get a Music Cape?

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: Yes, but you don't know all of the music in the land.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know any great stories about Basilisk Jaws?

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: Why do you ask?

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: Oh my! This must be the jaw of a legendary Basilisk Knight. There's a great song about how the Fremennik warriors of old would use these jaws to enhance their helmets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I have a nice helmet that Neitiznot's Burgher gave to me. I bet it would work well with that.

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: I'm sure it would, [Fremennik name]. Now, do you want to hear the song?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... I think I'll pass. Thanks for the help though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering... Can I learn to play my lyre again?

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: Well, that is an interesting question. Let me let you into a little secret. If you make another offering to Fossegrimen you will learn a secret melody.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of melody?

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: It is the song of Rellekka. When you play it, it will bring you back to this town wherever you are in this world.

lines.speaker: Olaf the Bard
lines.text: We often go adventuring with bards for precisely this reason; No matter where we have ended up we can return safe and sound to home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks Olaf!
